name: career-hq
title: Opportunity HQ
description: Operate Money Clock tasks from Opportunity HQ, Notion, and Eagle.
author: jerami_singleton

commands.name: log-task
commands.title: Log Opportunity Task
commands.description: Create a lean Opportunity HQ task.

commands.name: update-task
commands.title: Opportunity HQ Workbench
commands.description: Route Money Clock tasks: start, update, propose, proof, and open Notion.

commands.name: draft-proposal
commands.title: Draft Proposal
commands.description: Turn a copied freelance post into a proposal draft and log it back to Notion.

commands.name: capture-proof
commands.title: Capture Proof
commands.description: Import selected proof to Eagle and complete the related Opportunity HQ proof task.

preferences.name: notionToken
preferences.title: Notion Integration Token
preferences.description: Internal integration token with access to Opportunity HQ tasks and projects.

preferences.name: cashResumePath
preferences.title: Cash Jobs Resume Path
preferences.description: Optional resume file to open when starting Cash Jobs applications.

preferences.name: careerResumePath
preferences.title: Career Jobs Resume Path
preferences.description: Optional resume file to open when starting Career Jobs or freelance applications.

scripts.prepublishOnly:
echo "

It seems like you are trying to publish the Raycast extension to npm.

If you did intend to publish it to npm, remove the \`prepublishOnly\` script and rerun \`npm publish\` again.
If you wanted to publish it to the Raycast Store instead, use \`npm run publish\` instead.

" && exit 1
